title: BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack Incendium Version
description: Incendium-Compatible Edition of the BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack
body:
This is an add-on datapack for those who wish to play [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) in tandem with the worldgen and content datapack [Incendium](https://www.stardustlabs.net/datapacks#Incendium) by [Starmute](https://modrinth.com/user/Stardust).

## Modifications

- Ported over most of Incendium's already existing advancements and made them fully compatible with the Advancement Pack
- 9 brand new advancements have also been added alongside the ones from Incendium.
- "Raidin' Master" and "I am Loot!"  have been changed to include the new structures and loot tables respectively.
- "Limbo Walker" and "Inception" have also been tweaked to match the new height of the Nether roof.

If you are playing with both Terralith and Incendium, download the additional add-on that bridges the Terralith and Incendium addons [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/1sbb5gw35bdvqbz/%255BUNZIP_ME%255D_BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_Terralith%252BIncendium_1.20.1.zip/file).

## Installation
1. Download whatever compatibility datapacks you plan on using along with the original BlazeandCave’s Advancements Pack and whichever from [Terralith](https://www.stardustlabs.net/datapacks#Terralith) and [Nullscape](https://www.stardustlabs.net/datapacks#Nullscape) you plan on using. [Amplified Nether](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/amplified-nether-1-18/) is **not** compatible with Incendium.
2. Put all three datapacks into your world.
- If in a new world, make sure the compatibility datapacks are all above the original Advancements Pack. This datapack should be also above the original Incendium. The Terralith+Incendium version should be above both Terralith and Incendium. It should not matter which position Nullscape is in.
- If in an existing world that has had Terralith or Nullscape before, you will need to run the command **/function blazeandcave:global_install**. If you don't have cheats enabled, open to LAN and enable cheats in order to run this command.

## Notes
- The current stable version of the download will work with Incendium version 5.3.x + the direct port of Incendium 5.4.5, and BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack 1.16 - 1.19.
- The advancements scoreboard can be set to not count Incendium advancements with the following command:
**/scoreboard players set incendium_score bac_settings 0**

- To switch it back on use:
**/scoreboard players set incendium_score bac_settings 1**

The documentation for the datapack can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WnH-PSHdVCdoUsZZH5LO7ZeR1SRAl0HKHpCTfW4G_m4/edit?gid=1619232229#gid=1619232229).
The PlanetMinecraft link for the datapack can be found [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/blazeandcave-s-advancements-pack-incendium-version/).


The original BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack was made by [Cavinator1](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/cavinator1), go check out his creations!
